# Tom Lotozo — Film Photographer

Tom Lotozo is a film photographer based in Columbus, Ohio (Upper Arlington native). He shoots landscapes, travel, and outdoor portrait sessions on 35mm analog film using natural light. Prints are available from original film negatives.

## What Tom Does

- **Photography**: Landscapes, travel, and portrait sessions on 35mm film
- **Prints**: Fine art prints made to order from film originals — paper, canvas, metal
- **Portrait Sessions**: Outdoor sessions in natural light, Columbus and Central Ohio

## How to Book / Inquire

Email: lotozot@gmail.com
Subject: Portrait Session Inquiry / Print Inquiry

## Locations Served

Columbus, Ohio and Central Ohio. Favorite shooting locations include:
- Hayden Falls Park (Columbus)
- Griggs Reservoir / Quarry Rock (Columbus)
- Schiller Park / Merion Village (Columbus)
- Indian Run Falls (Dublin, OH)
- Blendon Woods Metro Park (Columbus)
- Hocking Hills State Park (~1 hour south of Columbus)
- Upper Arlington, OH

## About Tom

- Based in Columbus, Ohio (Upper Arlington)
- 5+ years shooting on film
- Cameras: Nikon FE (35mm), Holga (medium format), Polaroid
- Film stocks: Kodak Portra 400, Kodak Gold, Kodak Ektar, Ilford HP5
- Lab: Midwest Photo, Columbus, Ohio
- Prefers golden hour / evening natural light
- Instagram: @tibetanplatoz

## Portrait Sessions

Every session is outdoors using only natural light — no flash, no artificial lighting. Two rolls of 35mm film (~72 frames), professional lab development at Midwest Photo, scanned images delivered in approximately two weeks. Email to discuss pricing and availability.

## Prints

Fine art prints available made to order from film originals. Formats include paper, canvas, and metal. Email to inquire about a specific image.

## What Makes Tom Different

Tom shoots almost entirely on analog film. The grain, color rendering, and tonal quality of 35mm film produces images that feel different from digital — images you actually want to print and hang.

## Website

https://www.josephalotozo.com/tom/
